title: Brevo vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business needs.
intro: Both Brevo and Omnisend are freemium email marketing platforms with SMS capabilities, but they serve different audiences. Brevo is a comprehensive CRM suite offering multi-channel marketing beyond email, while Omnisend specializes in e-commerce automation. Your choice depends on whether you need broader business tools or focused e-commerce features.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Live Chat, CRM

choose_a_if: You need a comprehensive CRM suite with email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat in one platform
You want a truly free tier with up to 100,000 contacts for unlimited emails
You need transactional email API capabilities alongside marketing automation
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and want pre-built workflows and product picker features
You prefer a platform specifically designed for e-commerce brands
You need push notifications in addition to email and SMS

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Brevo is better for businesses seeking a comprehensive CRM with multi-channel capabilities, while Omnisend is superior for e-commerce brands wanting focused email and SMS automation. Brevo's free tier is significantly more generous, making it better for startups. Omnisend has stronger Trustpilot ratings and is purpose-built for online retailers.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend's paid plans start at $16/month versus Brevo's $25/month, making it cheaper for paid tiers. However, Brevo's free tier supports 100,000 contacts compared to Omnisend's 250, giving Brevo a significant advantage for growing businesses that want to stay free longer.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. Most data (contacts, segments, basic campaign history) can be migrated, though custom workflows and advanced automation settings may need to be rebuilt. We recommend exporting your data from Omnisend and consulting Brevo's migration resources before switching.
